title: carex × quebecensis
intro: Carex × quebecensis, also known as Quebec sedge, is a hybrid plant species in the Carex genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Carex × quebecensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
